commentaries.author: Cornelius a Lapide
commentaries.content: Abraham saith unto him, They have Moses and the Prophets, i.e. the writings of Moses and the Prophets, which the Scribes and Pharisees read and expound in their synagogues.

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content: The end of both of them, the "torments "of Herod and the "comfort "of John, that even now Herod might hear that warning: "They have there Moses and the prophets, let them hear them."
